CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Off Calendar

Notice And Joint Motion For Dismissal Of Plaintiff Individual Claims With Prejdudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ARVA ANDERSON's Notice And Joint Motion For Dismissal Of Plaintiff Individual Claims With Prejududice And Class Claims Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed "joint motion for dismissal of plaintiff's individual claims with prejudice and class claims without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
